headline: Is ServiceNow, Inc. (NOW) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is NOW a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on ServiceNow, Inc. on Growth Curve Investing’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on NOW. ServiceNow, Inc.’s share was trading at $114.19 as of June 8th. NOW’s trailing and forward P/E were 71.05 and 28.49 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]

headline: Is Fair Isaac Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: Fair Isaac has trailed behind the broader Nasdaq Composite over the past year, and analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s growth potential.

headline: ServiceNow IBM AI Alliance Targets Legacy Bottlenecks And Valuation Expectations
summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) and IBM are expanding their partnership to launch joint AI-focused solutions targeting legacy system modernization, enterprise data governance, and autonomous infrastructure operations. The new offerings are aimed at helping large enterprises address long standing obstacles to AI adoption at scale, including refactoring legacy applications, improving data quality and observability, and integrating end to end automation workflows. These joint solutions are expected to...
